name: Szechwan Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 large or 2 small green peppers, cut into 1/8-inch strips
1 large or 2 small carrots, finely chopped into 1/8-inch matchstick strips
1 pound Beef (round or chuck), cut into fine slivers or strips that are 1/8-inch by 2 to 3 inches long
1/4 teaspoon to 1/2 teaspoon chili paste (very hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the green peppers, carrots, and scallion for 1 to 2 minutes. Push aside.
2. Stir-fry the beef slivers for 1 to 2 minutes, then recombine with the vegetables. Add remaining ingredients.
3. Stir and heat thoroughly. Serve immediately with rice.
Serves: 4
